were the miscreants that fired the


pistol that blew up that platform at
Independence. Bloodhounds were sent
, there; they took the trail, but they
did not go to the miners headquar-
! tiers; they did not go to the union


miners houses. but they went, as If


the finger of God had pointed it out,
to the detective who was in the en-
ploy of the various associations that


are UNFOLDING martial lave in the
Cripple Creek district, and they were
| pulled off the track two different


times.


Reign OF Terror.


Then, my friends, the reign of


despotism commenced. The next day
| martial law was declared. Every


man in the district was prescribed,
even as the first born of Israel were
prescribed. They were rounded up,
they were convicted in advance. No
defense they might make was heard.


you must remember that the cit


liens alliance of Victor is composed
of men who were opposed to union
miners. Those miners in Cripple
Creek, the Western Federation of
Miners, have great store; and these
| men Of the Citizens Alliance set upon
that store and destroyed in the va
places there forty thousand dollars
worth of goods that were the result
of the Drawn and muscle Of the Fed
Grafton Of Miners. There was a mag
nificent hall in Victor which cost
100000, that had been built by the
toll of the wage earners belonging to
the Western Federation of Miners.
Men with guns and steel bullets rang
ed upon the other side and they prac-
tically shot down that magnificent
hall.


"They took coil Of rope and plac-
ed it around the sheriff's neck, threat
ened him with 1t and made him re-
sign; they overthrow the county
Judge, overthrow all Of the law, and
then, having taken away from the
miners Of the Cripple Creek district
every vestige of civil liberty, they


marched them one by one through
a hooting line into a car and deport-
ed them beyond the lines of the state.
Left to Starve.


What right has a military despot
to take a citizen of Colorado, against
whom no charge in any court is pend
ing and no affidavit or oath has been
lodged before any person, away from
his wife, his home, his children, his
property. marched him into an ar


mored train, run him into the state


Of Kansas and leave him to starvei


Tell me by what right little insig-


nifcant military commander, usurp-


ing all the powers Of the car Of Rus


STA. can take the flower of American


citizenship. the wage earners of an


entire district. into another state and
notify them that II they return to


their homes they will be killed?


Labor xfust SPEAK.


MY friends. union and non-unior
